batch.cadence: total report and total audio after at least 7-8 high-ROI rounds

rounds.title: Current-state scan
rounds.summary: Confirmed current Graph, Runtime Lite, artifact, attachment, workspace state, Vercel, and Supabase boundaries.

rounds.title: Engineering launch report
rounds.summary: Produced the 14-page engineering launch report and initial machine manifest.

rounds.title: Documentation pack consolidation
rounds.summary: Created docs/workflow-pro as the stable continuation pack.

rounds.title: Canonical workflow contract
rounds.summary: Defined nexus.workflow.v1 as distinct from workspace snapshots and Runtime Lite execution state.

rounds.title: Workflow Brain boot prompt
rounds.summary: Created the stable brain prompt for understanding, critiquing, optimizing, and proposing workflows.

rounds.title: UI architecture
rounds.summary: Defined Workflow Pro as a third tab with Design, Brain, Evidence, Proposal Diff, Files, and Settings modes.

rounds.title: Backend and persistence plan
rounds.summary: Documented artifact-first persistence, file node raw/compiler/compiled artifact flow, Supabase RLS boundary, and Vercel preview boundary.

rounds.title: Verification and batch close
rounds.summary: Verified JSON docs and created the R1-R8 total report handoff package.

firstSourceImplementationBatch.title: Stage 2/R9-R16

verification: browser smoke for Panels, Graph, Workflow Pro

protectedBehavior: Graph pan, zoom, drag, connect, node delete, and edge delete behavior
